mapper.select: SELECT z.*, u.real_name AS manager_name FROM farm_zone z LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON z.manager_id = u.id ORDER BY z.id
SELECT z.*, u.real_name AS manager_name FROM farm_zone z LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON z.manager_id = u.id WHERE z.manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY z.id
SELECT z.*, u.real_name AS manager_name FROM farm_zone z LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON z.manager_id = u.id WHERE z.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farm_zone(zone_name, crop_name, manager_id, status, plant_date, area, target_yield, zone_type, growth_stage) VALUES(#{zoneName}, #{cropName}, #{managerId}, #{status}, #{plantDate}, #{area}, #{targetYield}, #{zoneType}, #{growthStage})
